name: GreenLife
description: GreenLife creates everyday household essentials made from certified organic, renewable bamboo and plant fibers.

name: EarthGlow
description: EarthGlow is dedicated to formulating clean, zero-waste skin and personal care products using natural botanical extracts.

name: TerraWare
description: TerraWare manufactures highly durable, reusable steel and glass products to help people transition away from single-use plastics.
